title: Crispy Peruvian Chicken
description: A flavorful and spicy dish featuring crispy chicken breasts, inspired by Peruvian cuisine.
instructions: 2. Season the chicken breasts with salt and black pepper.
3. In a hot pan, sauté the garlic and Peruvian pepper until fragrant.
4. Add the stir-fry sauce and simmer for 2 minutes.
5. Add the chicken breasts to the pan and cook until browned on both sides.
6. Transfer the chicken to a baking dish and roast in the oven for 15-20 minutes, or until cooked through.
7. Meanwhile, stir-fry the crispy fried onions in a pan with a little oil until crispy.
8. Once the chicken is cooked, top each breast with stir-fried onions and serve.
